name: zzbd_manager_register_section_handler
description: zZbdManager::RegisterSectionHandler inserts a unique section handler node and ignores duplicate section names.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zZbdManager::RegisterSectionHandler: 222 unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 231 bytes and the VC object body is 176 bytes with 9 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies unique handler insertion, duplicate-name suppression, linked-list sentinel wiring, handler callbacks, sort order, and user data.
